RustFS is a fully S3-compatible object storage system, you can build a TypeScript SDK suitable for RustFS by wrapping the S3 TypeScript SDK. Through the SDK, you can operate RustFS, including creation and deletion of buckets/objects, file upload and download, etc."}],"\n",["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"prerequisites","children":"Prerequisites"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["An available RustFS instance (refer to ",["$","$L13",null,{"href":"/installation","children":"Installation Guide"}]," for installation)."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Access keys (refer to ",["$","$L13",null,{"href":"/administration/iam/access-token","children":"Access Key Management"}]," for creation)."]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"rustfs-typescript-sdk-construction","children":"RustFS TypeScript SDK Construction"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Using TypeScript's S3Client, construct a RustFS client with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"region"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"access_key_id"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"secret_access_key"}],", and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"endpoint_url"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L14",null,{"className":"shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","style":{"--shiki-light":"#24292e","--shiki-dark":"#e1e4e8","--shiki-light-bg":"#fff","--shiki-dark-bg":"#24292e"},"tabIndex":"0","icon":"$15","children":["$","$L16",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"line","children":[["$","span",null,{"style":{"--shiki-light":"#D73A49","--shiki-dark":"#F97583"},"children":"const"}],"$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b"]}],"\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22"]}]}]}],"\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30"]}],"$undefined"]}]

24:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"create-bucket","children":"Create Bucket"}]
